subject: session date
fact: The session date is Apr 12th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Apr 12th, 2026

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an Arcanoloth involved in a three-way confrontation in the dining hall.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had engineered between Vraxen the Arcanoloth

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fire giant involved in a three-way confrontation in the dining hall.
source_quote: the fire giant Veperyd

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is the High Inquisitor involved in a three-way confrontation in the dining hall.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Daein
fact: Daein lifted a stolen key from the obsidian table.
source_quote: Armed with the stolen key Daein had lifted from the obsidian table

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noticed that their imp guide had vanished entirely.
source_quote: Akritas noticed with a quiet unease that their imp guide had vanished entirely

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur examined the lift's locking mechanism and bypassed it.
source_quote: Felkur stepped forward to examine the lift's locking mechanism and... bypassing it

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur detected a magical glyph on the second tile of the corridor.
source_quote: the second tile was rigged with a devastating magical glyph that would have detonated in his face had he touched it

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast a powerful enchantment that stripped away all illusions and concealments.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all illusions and concealments

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur deduced that the stone golem was keyed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen.
source_quote: Felkur studied the creature carefully and deduced that it was keyed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen himself

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used a device to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear.
source_quote: produced a device he had originally built to extract unpleasant flavors from his food... extracting Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur opened the Lexicon of Oaths and found an entry regarding his name.
source_quote: Felkur opened the Lexicon and searched for his own name

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur altered the entry in the Lexicon, replacing his name with that of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: Felkur set to work altering the entry, carefully replacing his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur forged a new entry in the Lexicon attributing the original theft to the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: and then forged a new entry attributing the original theft to the Phantom Thief

subject: Felkur added a new entry crediting the Phantom Thief with stealing the record itself.
fact: Felkur added a new entry crediting the Phantom Thief with stealing the record itself.
source_quote: He also added a new entry crediting the Phantom Thief with stealing the record itself

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur slid a large pure crystal known as the Faerzess Shard into his pack.
source_quote: Felkur... also slid a large pure crystal — Faerzess Shard... quietly into his pack

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence who bought a brooch from Felkur Oldenwood.
source_quote: sold by one Felkur Oldenwood... to a fence named Limping Oric

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the entire party.
source_quote: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the entire party

subject: Felkur Oldenwood
fact: Felkur Oldenwood is the name under which Felkur sold a brooch while intoxicated.
source_quote: sold by one Felkur Oldenwood, intoxicated, blood alcohol content noted at a remarkable 0.18%

subject: Yugoloth
fact: Vraxen has secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: Vraxen's personal journal, which detailed the Arcanoloth's secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: dining hall
fact: Chaos erupted in the dining hall below.
source_quote: With chaos erupting in the dining hall below

subject: spire
fact: The party made for the lift access at the base of the spire.
source_quote: they made for the lift access at the base of the spire

subject: fifty-foot corridor
fact: The party found themselves at the entrance to a long, fifty-foot corridor lined with floor tiles.
source_quote: entrance to a long, fifty-foot corridor lined with floor tiles

subject: vault
fact: The party arrived at the vault door after crossing the corridor.
source_quote: arrived at the vault door

subject: vault chamber
fact: The vault chamber was cool and precisely maintained with walls lined with shelves.
source_quote: The chamber was cool and precisely maintained, its walls lined with shelves

subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem guarded the vault door.
source_quote: Guarding the door was a stone golem

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem stepped silently aside after sensing Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: it stepped silently aside

subject: Owlbear
fact: An Owlbear had been bounding across the Arcanoloth's table and picked up Vraxen's smell.
source_quote: the Owlbear, who had been bounding across the Arcanoloth's table not long before and had picked up the smell

subject: stolen key
fact: Daein lifted a stolen key from the obsidian table.
source_quote: Armed with the stolen key Daein had lifted from the obsidian table

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devilhide resting beneath a crystal dome on a stone pedestal.
source_quote: the Lexicon of Oaths — a massive tome bound in devilhide, its pages made from processed souls that glowed with a soft, eerie light

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updates itself with every infernal contract struck across Maerimydra.
source_quote: automatically updating itself with every infernal contract struck across Maerimydra

subject: brooch
fact: A priceless brooch belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra was sold by Felkur Oldenwood.
source_quote: sale of a priceless brooch belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra

subject: brooch
fact: The brooch possesses a ward that makes its bearer completely impervious to magical location.
source_quote: a ward that made its bearer completely impervious to magical location

subject: Vraxen's personal journal
fact: The party discovered Vraxen's personal journal detailing secret plans to betray his superiors.
source_quote: They discovered Vraxen's personal journal, which detailed the Arcanoloth's secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: soul coin ledger
fact: A soul coin ledger recording every infernal transaction in Maerimydra sat on a nearby shelf.
source_quote: A soul coin ledger recording every infernal transaction in Maerimydra sat on a nearby shelf

subject: Faerzess Shard
fact: The Faerzess Shard is a large pure crystal that is a powerful enhancer of artificer abilities.
source_quote: a large pure crystal — Faerzess Shard, a powerful enhancer of artificer abilities

subject: lift
fact: The lift has an ancient and notoriously unreliable Abyssal operating system.
source_quote: notoriously unreliable Abyssal operating system powering the device

subject: three-way confrontation
fact: The party engineered a three-way confrontation between Vraxen, Veperyd, and Veris.
source_quote: confrontation they had engineered between Vraxen the Arcanoloth, the fire giant Veperyd, and High Inquisitor Veris

subject: imp guide disappearance
fact: The party's imp guide vanished entirely.
source_quote: their imp guide had vanished entirely

subject: lift bypass
fact: Felkur bypassed the lift's locking mechanism so cleanly that no one below would notice it had been touched.
source_quote: bypassing it so cleanly that no one below would notice it had been touched at all

subject: glyph detection
fact: Felkur recoiled when he discovered the second tile was rigged with a devastating magical glyph.
source_quote: he suddenly recoiled — the second tile was rigged with a devastating magical glyph

subject: trap pattern revelation
fact: Through enchanted sight, the pattern of traps was revealed to be laid upon tiles corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: the pattern became clear: the traps were laid upon tiles corresponding to prime numbers

subject: golem bypass
fact: The stone golem stepped aside after registering the familiar scent of Vraxen extracted from the Owlbear.
source_quote: The golem's blank eyes registered the familiar scent, and it stepped silently aside

subject: vault entry
fact: Felkur made short work of the vault door's locks and the party stepped inside.
source_quote: Felkur's practiced hands made short work of its locks, and the party stepped inside

subject: contract loophole discovery
fact: Felkur found a loophole in the contract stating that if the Lexicon no longer contained the information needed to identify him, the contract was null and void.
source_quote: he found a loophole — if the Lexicon no longer contained the information needed to identify him, the contract was null and void

subject: Lexicon forgery
fact: Felkur altered the Lexicon entry to replace his name with Veris and forged a new entry blaming the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: Felkur set to work altering the entry, carefully replacing his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris, and then forged a new entry attributing the original theft to the Phantom Thief

subject: elevator approach
fact: The elevator began to move, bringing the sound of grinding stone and the approach of pursuit.
source_quote: The sound of the elevator beginning to move broke the moment of quiet looting, and the party heard the unmistakable grinding of stone and the approach of pursuit

subject: Phantom Thief legend
fact: Felkur's theft of the brooch sparked paranoid conspiracy theories and years of fruitless searching across Maerimydra.
source_quote: his theft had sparked paranoid conspiracy theories, multiple executions of high investigators, and years of fruitless searching across Maerimydra

subject: party contract
fact: A contract placed by Maram il Vass compels the party to retrieve the Lexicon and deliver it to him.
source_quote: placed a contract on the entire party, compelling them to retrieve the Lexicon and deliver it to him

subject: Vraxen's betrayal plans
fact: Vraxen's secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors are detailed in his personal journal.
source_quote: Vraxen's personal journal, which detailed the Arcanoloth's secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: stone golem fail-safe
fact: The stone golem's fail-safe began to reactivate.
source_quote: With the stone golem's fail-safe beginning to reactivate

subject: enemies ascending
fact: Enemies were ascending toward the party.
source_quote: enemies ascending toward them

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim spotted a hidden door concealed within the vault's walls.
source_quote: Bramgrim spotted a hidden door concealed within the vault's walls

subject: secret passage
fact: The adventurers slipped through a hidden door and climbed upward through a secret passage toward the very peak of the spire.
source_quote: the adventurers slipped through it, climbing upward through the secret passage toward the very peak of the spire

subject: circular chamber
fact: The party emerged into a vast circular chamber open to the poisonous clouds above.
source_quote: They emerged into a vast circular chamber open to the poisonous clouds above

subject: teleportation circle
fact: A permanent teleportation circle pulsed with sickly green light in the circular chamber.
source_quote: a permanent teleportation circle pulsed with sickly green light

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur set to work recalibrating the teleportation circle using his tools and arcane crystals.
source_quote: Felkur immediately set to work recalibrating the circle using his tools and the arcane crystals the party had collected

subject: The Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear planted itself over the floor hatch.
source_quote: The Owlbear planted itself over the floor hatch

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas readied her bow toward the iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Akritas readied her bow toward the iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Daein
fact: Daein positioned himself to provide support.
source_quote: Daein positioned himself to provide support

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast a protective enchantment over Felkur to shield him from direct assault.
source_quote: Bramgrim cast a protective enchantment over Felkur to shield him from direct assault

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used the magical mandolin to render Felkur invisible.
source_quote: Daein used the magical mandolin to render Felkur invisible

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur slipped behind one of the chamber's stone pillars to continue his work unseen.
source_quote: allowing the gnome to slip behind one of the chamber's stone pillars and continue his work unseen

subject: recalibration progress
fact: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration.
source_quote: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration

subject: crystal energy shift
fact: The crystals began to hum with redirected energy.
source_quote: the crystals beginning to hum with redirected energy

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris declared he would have Felkur's head and get his revenge.
source_quote: I will have his head. I will get my revenge.

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem smashed the iron door from its hinges.
source_quote: The stone golem smashed the iron door from its hinges

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris stormed into the chamber with his face twisted with fury.
source_quote: Veris stormed into the chamber, his face twisted with fury

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris accused the party of forgery and blamed him.
source_quote: Did you think I would not find your forgery? Blaming me?

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris stated he would not be killed by the likes of the party.
source_quote: I will not be killed by the likes of you!

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attempted to shove the stone golem back through the ruined doorway.
source_quote: Daein attempted to shove the golem back through the ruined doorway

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem barely registered Daein's effort to shove it.
source_quote: the massive construct barely registered the effort

subject: The Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear threw itself at the stone golem with raking magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear threw itself at the golem with raking magical claws

subject: stone golem
fact: The Owlbear tore into the stone of the golem with surprising ferocity.
source_quote: tearing into the stone with surprising ferocity

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon spectral guardians that swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon spectral guardians that swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits

subject: spectral guardians
fact: The spectral guardians tore at both the stone golem and Veris.
source_quote: tearing at both the golem and Veris as they advanced

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur deployed his eldritch cannon while invisible behind a pillar.
source_quote: Felkur, invisible behind his pillar, deployed his eldritch cannon

subject: eldritch cannon
fact: The eldritch cannon swiveled and fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank.
source_quote: which swiveled and fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked the stone golem as her quarry.
source_quote: Akritas marked the golem as her quarry

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas loosed a well-aimed shot that struck the stone golem true.
source_quote: loosed a well-aimed shot that struck true

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris teleported across the chamber to reposition himself.
source_quote: Veris, unwilling to be caught in the swirling chaos of the spirit guardians, teleported across the chamber to reposition himself

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris scanned the room for the hiding gnome.
source_quote: his eyes scanning the room for the gnome he knew had to be hiding somewhere

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur worked in silence and shadow, threading arcane crystals through the teleportation circle's mechanisms.
source_quote: Felkur worked in silence and shadow, his invisible hands threading arcane crystals through the teleportation circle's mechanisms with painstaking care

subject: Felkur Oldenwood
fact: Felkur Oldenwood was intoxicated with a blood alcohol content of 0.18% during a transaction recorded in the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: Seller, Felkur Oldenwood, Intoxicated. Price: 45 Gold Pieces. Notes: Seller repeatedly mumbled about a bad trade and should have kept the shiny thing. Blood alcohol content: 0.18%.

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The party discovered Felkur's entry in the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: The party discovers Felkur's entry in the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Phantom Thief legend
fact: Felkur accidentally became the legendary Phantom Thief after drunkenly selling a priceless artifact for 45 gold.
source_quote: revealing he drunkenly sold a priceless artifact for 45 gold and accidentally became the legendary Phantom Thief

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur questioned who uses the Abyssal operating system.
source_quote: Yo, who the hell uses the Abyssal operating system anymore, bro?

fact: The spire's lift mechanism runs on the outdated Abyssal 23 operating system.
source_quote: cracking open the spire's lift mechanism and discovering it runs on a notoriously outdated infernal OS

fact: Felkur discovered a legal loophole in his contract with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Felkur discovers a legal loophole in his contract with Maram il Vass

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur forged the Lexicon entry to name Veris instead of himself.
source_quote: so he simply forges the entry to name Veris instead

fact: The party voided their obligation to Maram il Vass through forgery rather than theft.
source_quote: allows the party to void their obligation entirely through forgery rather than theft

subject: the party
fact: The party used a stolen key to bypass security and access the lift leading to the upper levels of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: The party uses a stolen key to bypass security and access the lift leading to the upper levels of the spire

fact: Vraxen was one of the party's hosts who was distracted by a confrontation.

fact: Veperyd was one of the party's hosts who was distracted by a confrontation.

fact: Akritas noticed that their imp guide had disappeared during the escape.

fact: Felkur used his expert knowledge of mechanisms and thieves' tools to bypass the lock on the lift axis.

fact: Felkur successfully unlocked the lift.

fact: Felkur mocked the outdated Abyssal 23 operating system used by the spire's machinery.

fact: The party entered the lift to ascend toward the vault containing the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: The party enters the lift to ascend toward the vault containing the Lexicon of Oaths

fact: The party navigated a dangerous 50-foot corridor filled with magical traps.
source_quote: navigates a dangerous 50-foot corridor filled with magical traps

fact: The corridor was lined with floor tiles.

fact: Felkur poked and prodded the tiles and identified a hidden glyph of warding.

fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to reveal the traps.

fact: The party successfully navigated the corridor by stepping only on non-prime numbered tiles.

fact: A stone golem blocks the entrance to the vault acting as an unreasoning guardian.

fact: Felkur investigates the golem and determines it is programmed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen.
source_quote: Felkur investigates the golem and determines that it is programmed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen.

fact: Felkur extracts Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear using a specialized gadget.
source_quote: Felkur extracts Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear, who had picked it up while jumping on the Arcanoloth's table earlier.

fact: The golem steps aside to allow the party to reach the reinforced vault door after sensing the familiar scent.
source_quote: The golem, sensing the familiar scent, steps aside to allow the party to reach the reinforced vault door.

fact: Felkur uses his thieves' tools to expertly unlock the physical mechanism of the vault door.
source_quote: Felkur uses his thieves' tools to expertly unlock the physical mechanism of the vault door.

fact: The vault chamber is a temperature-controlled room kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.

fact: The brooch's ability made Felkur impervious to being located.

fact: Felkur decides against ripping a page out of the Lexicon of Oaths to avoid leaving a trace.

source_quote: damaging both the golem and Veris.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem while remaining invisible.
source_quote: Felkur, remaining invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem.

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark on the golem.
source_quote: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark on the golem

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas strikes the golem with a well-aimed shot.
source_quote: and strikes it with a well-aimed shot.

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris teleports across the chamber to gain a tactical advantage.
source_quote: Veris, furious over the party's forgery and intrusion, teleports across the chamber to gain a tactical advantage.

subject: combat status
fact: The session ends mid-combat on round 4.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4

subject: portal collapse
fact: There are 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses.
source_quote: with 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses.

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a formidable tower within the fire giant stronghold of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A formidable tower within the fire giant stronghold of Maerimydra

subject: party infiltration
fact: The party infiltrated the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning by posing as merchants.
source_quote: The party infiltrated it by posing as merchants

subject: key theft
fact: The party stole a key during a tense dinner at the Spire.
source_quote: stole a key during a tense dinner

subject: lift access
fact: The party used the stolen key to access the lift and vault within the Spire.
source_quote: used it to access the lift and vault within

subject: The Glyph Corridor
fact: The Glyph Corridor is a 50-foot long hallway within the Spire.
source_quote: A 50-foot long hallway within the Spire

subject: floor trap mechanism
fact: The floor tiles in the Glyph Corridor are rigged with explosive glyphs of warding on prime-numbered tiles.
source_quote: the floor tiles are rigged with explosive glyphs of warding on prime-numbered tiles

subject: The Vault of the Spire
fact: The Vault of the Spire is a 30-foot by 30-foot chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: A 30-foot by 30-foot chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: Vault contents
fact: The Vault of the Spire is lined with shelves of infernal contracts, soul coins, and infernal ledgers.
source_quote: lined with shelves of infernal contracts, soul coins, and infernal ledgers

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a central pedestal under a crystal dome in the Vault.
source_quote: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a central pedestal under a crystal dome

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak is a 60-foot diameter chamber at the very top of the spire.
source_quote: A 60-foot diameter chamber at the very top of the spire

subject: teleportation circle
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak features a permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy.
source_quote: featuring a permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: flight restriction
fact: Flying off the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak is not an option due to the surrounding poisonous clouds.
source_quote: Flying off is not an option due to the surrounding poisonous clouds

subject: final confrontation
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak was the site of the final confrontation with Veris and the stone golem.
source_quote: The site of the final confrontation with Veris and the stone golem

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an Arcanoloth who hosted the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: An Arcanoloth who hosted the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: scent usage
fact: Vraxen's personal scent was used to bypass the vault's stone golem guardian.
source_quote: His personal scent was used to bypass the vault's stone golem guardian

subject: Vraxen's Personal Journal
fact: Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors was discovered in the vault.
source_quote: his personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors was discovered in the vault

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fire giant who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A fire giant who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Veperyd confrontation
fact: Veperyd was drawn into the three-way confrontation that allowed the party to escape.
source_quote: was drawn into the three-way confrontation that allowed the party to escape

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is the High Inquisitor of Mulmaster, secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: The High Inquisitor of Mulmaster, secretly hunting Felkur

subject: Veris forgery
fact: Veris's name was forged into the Lexicon of Oaths by Felkur to frame him for the theft of a priceless artifact.
source_quote: His name was forged into the Lexicon of Oaths by Felkur to frame him for the theft of a priceless artifact

subject: Veris pursuit
fact: Veris pursues the party to the top of the spire, furious over the forgery.
source_quote: He pursues the party to the top of the spire, furious over the forgery

subject: Veris teleportation
fact: Veris teleports into the portal chamber to confront the party.
source_quote: teleports into the portal chamber to confront them

subject: Owlbear
fact: Owlbear is the party's sidekick who caused a distraction by jumping on the magical table during the dinner.
source_quote: The party's sidekick who caused a distraction by jumping on the magical table during the dinner

subject: Owlbear scent pickup
fact: The Owlbear inadvertently picked up Vraxen's scent while jumping on the table.
source_quote: inadvertently picking up Vraxen's scent

subject: Owlbear hatch block
fact: The Owlbear was later used to block the floor hatch in the portal chamber.
source_quote: Later used to block the floor hatch in the portal chamber

subject: Owlbear combat
fact: The Owlbear engaged the stone golem in melee combat with magical claws.
source_quote: engaged the stone golem in melee combat with magical claws

subject: Stone Golem
fact: A massive, magically immune guardian stationed before the vault door was programmed to only allow passage to those carrying Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: A massive, magically immune guardian stationed before the vault door, programmed to only allow passage to those carrying Vraxen's scent

subject: Second Stone Golem
fact: A second stone golem accompanied Veris to the portal chamber.
source_quote: A second stone golem accompanied Veris to the portal chamber

subject: Second Stone Golem entry
fact: The second stone golem smashed through the door to the portal chamber.
source_quote: smashing through the door

subject: Second Stone Golem combat
fact: The second stone golem engaged the party in combat.
source_quote: engaging the party in combat

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence based in Daggerford who purchased a stolen brooch from a drunken Felkur years ago.
source_quote: A fence based in Daggerford who purchased a stolen brooch from a drunken Felkur years ago

subject: Limping Oric memory loss
fact: Limping Oric could not remember who sold the brooch to him due to the brooch's magic.
source_quote: Due to the brooch's magic, he could not remember who sold it to him

subject: Obsidian Table Key
fact: Daein stole the Obsidian Table Key from an obsidian table during the dinner at the Spire.
source_quote: A key stolen by Daein from an obsidian table during the dinner at the Spire

subject: Key usage
fact: The Obsidian Table Key was used to grant access to the spire's lift and ultimately the vault.
source_quote: used to grant access to the spire's lift and ultimately the vault

subject: Thieves' Tools
fact: Felkur used a set of specialized tools to bypass the lift mechanism and unlock the vault door.
source_quote: A set of specialized tools used by Felkur to bypass the lift mechanism and unlock the vault door

subject: Lock picking skill
fact: Felkur's use of the thieves' tools left no trace of tampering.
source_quote: with exceptional skill that left no trace of tampering

subject: Scent Extractor
fact: The Scent Extractor is a specialized mechanism among Felkur's gadgets, originally designed to extract flavors to avoid spicy food.
source_quote: A specialized mechanism among Felkur's gadgets, originally designed to extract flavors to avoid spicy food

subject: Scent extraction
fact: The Scent Extractor was repurposed to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear's fur to fool the stone golem guardian.
source_quote: Repurposed to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear's fur to fool the stone golem guardian

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made from processed souls glowing with inner light.
source_quote: A massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made from processed souls glowing with inner light

subject: Lexicon automatic update
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updates with all infernal contracts.
source_quote: It automatically updates with all infernal contracts

subject: Lexicon alteration
fact: Felkur altered the Lexicon of Oaths entries to replace his name with Veris's and add a new entry attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: Felkur altered its entries to replace his name with Veris's and add a new entry attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief

subject: Priceless Brooch
fact: The Priceless Brooch is a powerful artifact belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A powerful artifact belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra

subject: Brooch theft
fact: Felkur stole the Priceless Brooch while drunk and sold it to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: Felkur stole it while drunk and sold it to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces

subject: Brooch magic activation
fact: The Priceless Brooch possesses a special ability that makes the bearer impervious to being located, which Felkur accidentally activated.
source_quote: It possesses a special ability that makes the bearer impervious to being located, which Felkur accidentally activated

subject: Phantom Thief identity
fact: The accidental activation of the brooch's magic led to Felkur becoming known as the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: leading to him becoming known as the Phantom Thief

subject: Soul Coins
fact: Soul Coins are currency found within the vault, representing captured souls used in infernal transactions.
source_quote: Currency found within the vault, representing captured souls used in infernal transactions

subject: Soulcoin Ledger
fact: The Soulcoin Ledger is a record of all soulcoin transactions in Maerimydra found by the party in the vault.
source_quote: A record of all soulcoin transactions in Maerimydra, found by the party in the vault

subject: Soulcoin Ledger value
fact: The Soulcoin Ledger was noted as valuable blackmail material.
source_quote: noted as valuable blackmail material

subject: Vraxen's Personal Journal
fact: Vraxen's Personal Journal is a private journal discovered in the vault detailing the Arcanoloth's plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: A private journal discovered in the vault detailing the Arcanoloth's plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: Faerzess Shard
fact: Felkur stole a large, pure crystal called the Faerzess Shard from the vault.
source_quote: A large, pure crystal stolen from the vault by Felkur

subject: Faerzess Shard effect
fact: The Faerzess Shard enhances an artificer's abilities, acting similarly to a wand of the mage with a limited number of charges per day.
source_quote: It enhances an artificer's abilities, acting similarly to a wand of the mage with a limited number of charges per day

subject: Faerzess Shard bonus
fact: The Faerzess Shard provides a bonus to artificer abilities.
source_quote: providing a bonus to artificer abilities

subject: Blank Infernal Contracts
fact: Blank Infernal Contracts are blank contracts found in the vault that could be used to bind devils.
source_quote: Blank contracts found in the vault that could be used to bind devils

subject: Contract theft
fact: A party member took the Blank Infernal Contracts.
source_quote: taken by a party member

subject: Arcane Crystals
fact: Felkur collected blue, white, and green Arcane Crystals earlier.
source_quote: Blue, white, and green crystals collected earlier

subject: Portal recalibration
fact: Felkur used the Arcane Crystals to recalibrate the teleportation circle.
source_quote: used by Felkur to recalibrate the teleportation circle

subject: Recalibration buffer
fact: The Arcane Crystals provided additional time in case concentration was lost during the recalibration.
source_quote: providing additional time in case concentration was lost

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: Daein used a Magical Mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur.
source_quote: An instrument used by Daein to cast Invisibility on Felkur

subject: Felkur concealment
fact: The Magical Mandolin concealed Felkur from Veris and the stone golem during the portal room battle.
source_quote: concealing him from Veris and the stone golem during the portal room battle

subject: Eldritch Cannon
fact: Felkur deployed an Eldritch Cannon, a magical device that fires blasts of energy at enemies.
source_quote: A magical device deployed by Felkur that fires blasts of energy at enemies

subject: Eldritch Cannon usage
fact: Felkur maintained concentration on the portal recalibration while the Eldritch Cannon fired.
source_quote: while he maintains concentration on the portal recalibration

subject: True Seeing cast
fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to reveal the hidden magical glyphs on the floor tiles in the corridor.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to reveal the hidden magical glyphs on the floor tiles in the corridor

subject: Trap navigation
fact: True Seeing allowed the party to identify the pattern of the traps and navigate safely.
source_quote: allowing the party to identify the pattern of the traps and navigate safely

subject: Vault trap check
fact: True Seeing was used to confirm the vault chamber was free of traps.
source_quote: Also used to confirm the vault chamber was free of traps

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding are magical traps placed on the prime-numbered floor tiles of the corridor leading to the vault.
source_quote: Magical traps placed on the prime-numbered floor tiles of the corridor leading to the vault

subject: Glyph explosion trigger
fact: The Glyphs of Warding are designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals.
source_quote: designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals

subject: Sanctuary cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Sanctuary on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting him with direct melee attacks.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting him with direct melee attacks

subject: Sanctuary duration
fact: The Sanctuary spell protected Felkur while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle.
source_quote: while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle

subject: Invisibility cast
fact: Daein cast Invisibility via a magical mandolin to hide Felkur from Veris and the stone golem.
source_quote: Cast by Daein via a magical mandolin to hide Felkur from Veris and the stone golem

subject: Invisibility tactical use
fact: Invisibility allowed Felkur to work on the portal from behind a pillar without being directly targeted.
source_quote: allowing him to work on the portal from behind a pillar without being directly targeted

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spirit Guardians at fifth level to create a protective area of spectral spirits.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim at fifth level to create a protective area of spectral spirits

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: The spectral spirits damaged both the stone golem and Veris as they entered the portal chamber.
source_quote: that damaged both the stone golem and Veris as they entered the portal chamber

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas used Hunter's Mark to magically mark the stone golem as her quarry.
source_quote: Used by Akritas to magically mark the stone golem as her quarry

subject: Hunter's Mark damage
fact: The mark dealt additional damage with Akritas's attacks against the stone golem.
source_quote: dealing additional damage with her attacks against it

subject: Teleport
fact: Veris employed Teleport to instantly reposition himself within the portal chamber.
source_quote: Employed by Veris to instantly reposition himself within the portal chamber

subject: Teleport tactical advantage
fact: The repositioning gave Veris a tactical advantage against the party.
source_quote: gaining a tactical advantage against the party

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem entered the portal chamber and was damaged by spectral spirits.
source_quote: damaged both the stone golem

subject: Veris
fact: Veris entered the portal chamber and was damaged by spectral spirits.
source_quote: damaged both the stone golem and Veris as they entered the portal chamber

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spirit Guardians.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas used Hunter's Mark on the stone golem.
source_quote: Used by Akritas to magically mark the stone golem

subject: portal chamber
fact: The portal chamber is where Veris repositioned himself and where the stone golem and Veris entered.
source_quote: as they entered the portal chamber
